tracks.lyrics:
[Verse]
A white room glows under city light
New names bloom on a paper line
Every promise sounds expensive now
Every silence makes a louder sound
[Pre-Chorus]
Build the scene, pull the camera close
Leave one spark where the chorus goes
[Chorus]
Write the warning in a clean refrain
Make the glamour feel a little dangerous
Write the warning in a clean refrain
Let the drums smile while the bass turns anxious
[Bridge]
Drop the lights to a midnight frame
Bring the vocal forward, dry and strange
[Outro]
Let the echo close the door again
tracks.copyright: Public demo fixture text, not the original lyric. Original lyrics remain available only through the licensed provider flow.

tracks.note: Bundled public-demo metadata. The private demo can fetch live provider metadata.
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Bright claps count in the first big smile
[Verse]
Schoolyard lights and a radio crush
Every heartbeat starts to rush
[Pre-Chorus]
Stack the doubles, make it shine
Keep the kick soft under every line
[Chorus]
Turn the hook into a playground chant
Let the melody bounce where the drums land
Turn the hook into a playground chant
Keep the bass simple so the vocal can dance
[Bridge]
Pull the beat back for a half-time grin
Then let the final chorus rush back in
[Outro]
Fade the chant with the handclaps high
